name: Multi-Factor AI Analyst (ValueCell-inspired)
description: Combine fundamental analysis, market sentiment, and technical signals to rank and trade stocks. Mimics a team of AI analyst agents: one for fundamentals, one for sentiment, one for technicals.

setup.description: Score stocks on 3 factors: (1) Fundamental value (P/E, revenue growth), (2) Sentiment (recent price momentum as proxy), (3) Technical (RSI, moving average trend). Buy top-ranked, sell bottom-ranked.

entry.long: Buy stocks ranking in top quintile across all 3 factors

factors.name: fundamental
factors.description: Low P/E + positive earnings growth = value + quality

factors.name: sentiment_momentum
factors.description: 3-month price momentum as proxy for market sentiment

factors.name: technical
factors.description: Price above 50-day MA + RSI between 30-70 (not overbought/oversold)

notes: Since we cannot pull live fundamental data in backtest, we use price-derived proxies: 6-month return (value momentum), 3-month return (sentiment), and technical indicators (MA/RSI).
